---
title: "Lab 3a: Joining & Querying Surveillance Data (QGIS)"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · QGIS track · Day 3"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab03a_JoinsQueries_QGIS_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab03a_JoinsQueries_QGIS_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Online version](lab3a-online.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab03a_JoinsQueries_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab03a_JoinsQueries_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab3a-qgis.md >}}
